untranslatable_reason: Signal requires dynamic leverage adjustment based on cumulative drawdown (g_cppi calculation and leverage multiplier = 1 + current_drawdown). The backtest engine does not support dynamic leverage scaling as a tradable condition. The signal also references optimalF (optimal leverage from Kelly/f calculations) which is not available as a real-time indicator. Cumulative drawdown tracking and leverage adjustment require state management beyond the condition-based rule engine.
translation_notes: Translated maximum drawdown threshold (-50%) as stop_loss_pct. Entry condition checks that cumulative returns have not breached -50%. Exit condition triggers when cumulative returns reach or fall below -50%. The proportional leverage reduction logic (new_leverage = current_leverage × (1 + period_return)) cannot be expressed in the available operators and indicators.
